subject: Dalakos, a blue-skinned merfolk or fish-humanoid artificer, working among ropes, mechanisms, and tools in a workshop setting
description: A blue-skinned humanoid figure with visible scale-like skin texture and small wing or fin structures at the shoulders occupies the center of the image. The figure wears layered robes in blue and gold and holds a rope or cord in one hand; the other arm is extended toward a mechanical apparatus partially visible at the right edge of the frame. The background shows a cluttered workshop — hanging ropes, scrollwork patterns on an upper wall, and glittering lights suggest both a maritime and inventive environment. The figure's expression is engaged and alert.
foreground: Blue-scaled humanoid artificer in robes; rope in hand
background: Workshop interior; ropes, mechanical elements, glowing lights
emotion: focused curiosity — figure leans into their work with intent
